label: Bonn Challenge Pledges
contestNote: Pledges cover commitments from 70+ countries but actual restoration delivery is estimated at ~50 million ha — a 76% implementation gap.

label: Great Green Wall Completion
contestNote: Figure includes mixed-quality land coverage; independent WRI analysis puts verified native restoration closer to 4%. NPR Apr 2026: only 13% of $19B pledged has been disbursed. 100% target is 100 million ha by 2030.

label: UN Decade Restoration Target
source: UNEP / UN Decade on Ecosystem Restoration (2021–2030)
contestNote: Official UNEP target; mid-decade progress estimated at ~300–500 million ha under varying forms of restoration commitment.

label: Trees Committed (1t.org)
contestNote: Covers pledges from 90+ countries and 80+ companies; survival and biodiversity quality of planted trees remain largely unverified at scale.

label: Annual Net Forest Loss
source: FAO Global Forest Resources Assessment 2020 / Global Forest Watch (2023)
contestNote: FAO net figure masks gross deforestation of ~10 M ha/yr offset by plantation gains; primary old-growth loss far exceeds new-growth recovery in biodiversity value.

label: Global Mangrove Coverage
contestNote: Mangroves lost ~50% of extent since 1950s; current loss rate is 0.3–0.6%/year. Some datasets show slight net recovery in certain regions.

label: AFR100 Pledges (Africa)
contestNote: Commitments from 34 African countries; IUCN Barometer shows delivery significantly lagging behind pledges in most participating nations.

label: Amazon Deforestation (Brazil 2023)
source: INPE (Brazil National Institute for Space Research, 2024)
contestNote: A 50% reduction vs. the 2021 peak of ~21,000 km² under Bolsonaro; the Lula government's enforcement recovery is widely verified.
